content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix(auth_mw)
C: min_fix ∧ preserve(next(err)) ∧ skew_budget(30)
P: normalize_ms → cmp(expMs+skew30,"<",nowMs) ⇒ "401" → single_site(expiry_check)
V: test(boundary_exact) ∧ test(edge(skew30,pass)) ∧ test(edge(skew31,fail)) ∧ test(refresh_loop_absent)
A: patch(expiry_cmp) ∧ reg_test(skew30_boundary)

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(auth middleware).
Constraints: minimal fix and preserve(next(err)) and skew budget(30).
Plan: normalize_ms then cmp(expMs+skew30, "<", nowMs) implies "401" then single_site(expiry_check).
Verify: test(boundary_exact) and test(edge(30-second grace window, pass)) and test(edge(skew31, fail)) and test(refresh_loop_absent).
Answer target: patch(expiry_cmp) and regression test(skew30_boundary).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: default_arch
C: team(6) ∧ ddl("4 months") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ ops(pt_devops) ∧ traffic(modest)
P: recommend(modular_monolith) ∧ seams(billing,core_app) ∧ split(post_release)
V: ship_on_time ∧ clean_module_seams ∧ split_readiness
A: modular_monolith ∧ short_why("low_ops ∧ fast_ship ∧ deferred_split")

[AUDIT]
Goal: default modular architecture.
Constraints: team(6) and deadline("4 months") and store("PostgreSQL") and ops(pt_devops) and traffic(modest).
Plan: recommend(modular_monolith) and seams(billing, core_app) and split(post_release).
Verify: ship_on_time and clean_module_seams and split_readiness.
Answer target: modular_monolith and short rationale("low_ops ∧ fast_ship ∧ deferred_split").

@flint v0 hybrid
G: review(diff)
C: trust_boundary ∧ session_auth ∧ public_edge
P: drop_header("x-user-id") ∧ bind(userId, session.userId) ∧ preserve("401")
V: test(spoofed_header) ∧ test(missing_session) ∧ test(cross_user_denial)
A: risk(impersonation) ∧ mitigation(session_only) ∧ verify(boundary_tests)

[AUDIT]
Goal: review(diff).
Constraints: trust_boundary and session_auth and public_edge.
Plan: drop_header("x-user-id") and bind(userId, session.userId) and preserve("401").
Verify: test(spoofed_header) and test(missing_session) and test(cross_user_denial).
Answer target: risk(impersonation) and mitigation(session_only) and verify(boundary_tests).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: preserve_order ∧ minimal_change ∧ single_err_site("next(err)")
P: validate(missing_id) → "await" db.findUser → branch(not_found) → audit.log → cache.set → respond
V: success_path ∧ missing_id_early ∧ db_err→"next(err)" ∧ no_duplicate_callback
A: "async"_"await" ∧ keep("next(err)") ∧ anchors_verbatim

@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix("heapUsed" leak)
C: min_diff ∧ preserve(next(err)) ∧ callback_style
P: audit("setInterval" callback) ∧ null_batch_refs ∧ hoist_shared_state ∧ clear_on_tick_end
V: heap_stable_empty_queue ∧ heap_stable_after_batches ∧ no_retained_closures
A: root_cause("retained closures in setInterval hold batch rows") ∧ min_fix(release_refs_per_tick) ∧ reg_test(heapUsed_flat_over_ticks)

@flint v0 hybrid
G: design(audit_schema)
C: "7 years" ∧ compliance_export ∧ lean_ops
P: schema("JSONB") ∧ partition(monthly) ∧ pk(id_ts) ∧ idx(actor_ts) ∧ idx(entity_ts)
V: test(export_range) ∧ test(partition_prune) ∧ test(retention_drop)
A: schema_sketch ∧ partition_monthly ∧ why(ops_drop_old_partitions)

[AUDIT]
Goal: design(audit_schema).
Constraints: "7 years" and compliance_export and lean_ops.
Plan: schema("JSONB") and partition(monthly) and pk(id_ts) and idx(actor_ts) and idx(entity_ts).
Verify: test(export_range) and test(partition_prune) and test(retention_drop).
Answer target: schema_sketch and partition_monthly and why(ops_drop_old_partitions).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix(rate_limit_key)
C: public_boundary ∧ no_trust("X-Forwarded-For")
P: strip_xff_at_edge → key(req.ip) → incr("Redis")
V: test(spoofed_xff) ∧ test(shared_ip) ∧ test(missing_xff)
A: bind(req.ip) ∧ drop("X-Forwarded-For") ∧ risk(bypass_via_spoof)

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(rate_limit_key).
Constraints: public_boundary and no_trust("X-Forwarded-For").
Plan: strip_xff_at_edge then key(req.ip) then incr("Redis").
Verify: test(spoofed_xff) and test(shared_ip) and test(missing_xff).
Answer target: bind(req.ip) and drop("X-Forwarded-For") and risk(bypass_via_spoof).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: extract("@atlas/currency")
C: preserve_call_sites ∧ minimal_diff ∧ single_source_of_truth
P: audit_duplicates → define_api → scaffold_package → replace_imports("package.json") → deprecate_local
V: semver("1.0.0") ∧ pin_exact ∧ unit_parity ∧ snapshot_billing ∧ snapshot_audit ∧ snapshot_gateway
A: extraction_plan ∧ versioning_strategy("semver") ∧ test_strategy

[AUDIT]
Goal: extract("@atlas/currency").
Constraints: preserve_call_sites and minimal_diff and single_source_of_truth.
Plan: audit_duplicates then define_api then scaffold_package then replace_imports("package.json") then deprecate_local.
Verify: semver("1.0.0") and pin_exact and unit_parity and snapshot_billing and snapshot_audit and snapshot_gateway.
Answer target: extraction_plan and versioning_strategy("semver") and test_strategy.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: idempotent_receiver
C: postgres ∧ retry_safe ∧ observable
P: persist("Idempotency-Key") ∧ unique_index ∧ tx_insert_then_process ∧ return_cached_response
V: dup_returns("409") ∧ replay_logged ∧ race_safe ∧ crash_mid_process_recovers
A: dedup=unique_key_row ∧ error=conflict_on_dup("409") ∧ why=single_write_point

[AUDIT]
Goal: idempotent_receiver.
Constraints: postgres and retry_safe and observable.
Plan: persist("Idempotency-Key") and unique_index and tx_insert_then_process and return_cached_response.
Verify: dup_returns("409") and replay_logged and race_safe and crash_mid_process_recovers.
Answer target: dedup=unique_key_row and error=conflict_on_dup("409") and why=single_write_point.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix("N+1")
C: preserve_shape ∧ min_fix
P: batch(customerIds) → map(row,user) → replace(loop_call)
V: reg_test(latency) ∧ shape_eq
A: min_fix ∧ reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix("N+1").
Constraints: preserve_shape and minimal fix.
Plan: batch(customerIds) then map(row, user) then replace(loop_call).
Verify: regression test(latency) and shape_eq.
Answer target: minimal fix and regression test.
